photo_library.name: Photo Library
photo_library.description: Read Apple Photos or local photo directories, extract capture time, location, and device metadata, and ingest into the timeline
Manage photo sources that feed the timeline.

apple_photos.description: Read the macOS Photos library directly.
apple_photos.unavailable_reason: Apple Photos is only available on macOS.

enabled.label: Enable
enabled.description: Turn on photo library sync for the timeline.

source_paths.label: Photo Directories
source_paths.description: Local directories containing photos to scan. Add one or more paths.

source_mode.label: Source
source_mode.description: Choose whether to scan exported folders or the macOS Apple Photos library.

photos_library_path.label: Apple Photos Library
photos_library_path.description: Path to the .photoslibrary package to scan with osxphotos.

exclude_patterns.label: Exclude Patterns
exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns for directories or files to skip (e.g. thumbnails, .cache).

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: How photo library should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: Polling interval used for interval-based sync.

max_items_per_sync.label: Max Items Per Sync
max_items_per_sync.description: Maximum number of photos to process per sync run.

settle_window_hours.label: Session Settle Window (hours)
settle_window_hours.description: How long a burst of continuous shooting must stay quiet before it is treated as a finished session and written to the timeline. Lower values surface results sooner; higher values keep outings grouped more reliably.

activation.title: Enable Photo Library
activation.description: Photo library is sensitive local data. Choose Apple Photos or local folders before this source starts running.

directory.label: Local Photos
directory.description: Scan exported folders or any local photo directories.

apple_photos.label: Apple Photos
apple_photos.description: Read the macOS Photos library directly.
apple_photos.unavailable_reason: Apple Photos is only available on macOS.

apple_photos_permissions.title: Apple Photos Access
apple_photos_permissions.description: Apple Photos mode needs osxphotos and macOS permission to read the Photos library.

osxphotos_dependency.label: osxphotos dependency
osxphotos_dependency.description: Required to read Apple Photos metadata without parsing Photos internals directly.

photos_library_access.label: Photos Library Access
photos_library_access.description: Required to read the local Photos library database. Grant Photos or Full Disk Access to the app running Magi if this is denied.
